expectations.text: Creates a review artifact file under code_review/ (e.g. code_review/<feature>/quality-review.md)
expectations.evidence: Artifact exists at outputs/code_review/order-service/quality-review.md (verified on disk), matching the code_review/<feature>/quality-review.md shape.
Only the review.md and the code_review artifact were written; no claim of modifying order_service.ts. Scope limitations describe it as a read-only single-file review.

expectations.text: The saved report contains a Verdict and findings with stable CQ-IDs
expectations.evidence: Saved artifact has '## Verdict' = 'REQUEST CHANGES' and findings headed '### CQ-001' through '### CQ-005'.

expectations.text: Recommends adding code_review/ to .gitignore without editing .gitignore unless asked
expectations.evidence: No occurrence of 'gitignore' or '.gitignore' anywhere in the eval-6 new_skill outputs (review.md or the saved artifact). The recommendation to gitignore code_review/ was never made.
